untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires multi-bar formation analysis (formation end timing), 12-month lookback statistics (breakout location probability relative to annual range), and decline percentages conditioned on market regime/pullback presence. These require external lookback windows beyond standard indicators and regime classification logic not available in indicator set. Core breakout detection is translatable, but full pattern logic (formation end detection, 12-month positioning, conditional decline expectations) cannot be expressed with available indicators.
